-The session is for Figure Skaters FS1 or higher.
-Priority of right of way is in the following order:
          1) Skaters in Programs
          2) Skaters in Lesson
          3) All other freestyle skaters
-Please be mindful of your surroundings


Freestyle Rules:

- All Skaters must check in at Front desk before entering Ice
- NO Virtual/Zoom Lessons
- NO Refunds, Credits, Session changes or exchanges.
- NO Waitlist for Full Sessions

OIC - Gretzky HourFull Hockey Gear Required Each player is required to check in at the front desk before each session and must wear their sticker receipt visible on their pants. Full USA Hockey Certified equipment is required. Limit 40 skaters and 4 goalies. Program Fee: $21 per session Players and Goalies must pay the full fee per session. No outside or private coaches are allowed on the ice at any time. - Unless approved through management.

Private Hockey Lessons Players must be on the ice with a Sharks Ice private coach!

The Oakland Ice Center/Sharks Ice proudly offers a learn to skate program which has been developed especially for athletes with special physical and developmental challenges. Emphasizing fun and safety, the Special Skater program helps to improve balance and coordination which promotes an "I can do it!" attitude that carries over into other aspects of the participant's life. With the assistance of volunteers, skaters develop skills, make new friends and experience a new found freedom and sense of accomplishment.

Participants are allowed 1 family member to assist skater on ice. Fee includes skate rentals. There are no refunds, makeups, or credits for missed classes.

Youth Goalie Clinic

Focusing on skating, edgework, and puck control

45 minutes focus on fundamentals and skating. Goalie session participants are welcomed to Travel Skills Clinic that follows at no additional cost.

Goalie Coaches: Brad Martin plus various Bears coaching staff.
